monitor.capture_what: The URL argument passed to httpx.get() — the full attacker-controlled URL string

oracle_check.condition_description: The URL passed to httpx.get() points to an internal/private IP, localhost, or cloud metadata endpoint, confirming SSRF exploitation with no validation blocking the request
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY/FULL-SSRF: httpx.get() called with attacker-controlled internal/metadata URL — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}

fuzz_guidance.skip_condition: not (isinstance(image_file, str) and ('http://' in str(image_file) or 'https://' in str(image_file)))
